content_sections.heading: Karnataka High Court Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Karnataka High Court Recruitment 2026 notification released for 73 posts of Assistant Court Secretary. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree, BCA, B.B.A, B.Com, B.Sc Can Apply Online. The Online application process for Karnataka High Court Recruitment 2026 has started on 01-07-2026 and will remain open until 30-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Karnataka High Court website, judiciary.karnataka.gov.in/.

content_sections.heading: Karnataka High Court Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The Karnataka High Court Assistant Court Secretary Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on 01-07-2026 at judiciary.karnataka.gov.in/. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. Karnataka High Court Assistant Court Secretary Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : Karnataka High Court Assistant Court Secretary Online Form 2026 Post Date : 02-07-2026 Total Vacancy : 73 Posts Brief Information: The Karnataka High Court has announced a notification for the recruitment of Assistant Court Secretary Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

rows.karnataka_high_court_advt_no_hcrb_acs_1_: Application Fee General Merit: Rs 500/- Category - II(A) / II(B) / III(A) / III(B) of Other Backward Classes: Rs 500/- Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe / Category – I of Other Backward Classes / Persons with Benchmark Disability: Rs 250/-
Karnataka High Court Recruitment 2026 Important Dates Last Date for Apply Online : 30-07-2026

Karnataka High Court Recruitment 2026 Age Limit Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years Maximum Age limit: 40 Years Maximum Age: 43 years (Category - II(A) / II(B) / III(A) / III(B) of Other Backward Classes) Maximum Age: 45 years (Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe / Category – I of Other Backward Classes)

Eligibility Criteria Bachelor degree in Science / Arts / Commerce / Business Management / Computer Applications / Business Administration or its equivalent examination. Senior Grade or Proficiency Grade Examination in English Shorthand AND Senior Grade Typing Examination in English. OR Diploma in Commercial Practice / Secretarial Practice in English. Must have knowledge of operation of Computers.

Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online
